gpu: AMD Radeon RX 6950 XT (radeonsi, navi21, LLVM 18.1.8, DRM 3.57, 6.10.9-arch1-2)

notes: Game runs smooth with the occasional frame drop when moving a lot. Probably loading assets. I tested this for so who has frequent crashes.

Initially, there was a warning about low /proc/sys/vm/max_map_count. This has been resolved by increasing it to 1048576 system-wide, and the warning no longer appears in the logs. The game still fails to launch.

The game always fails to initialize DirectX 12, displaying the error "DirectX 12 is not supported on your system." (See screenshot).

The Proton log (created with PROTON_LOG=1 VKD3D_DEBUG=trace %command%) shows the following error during D3D12 device creation:

26928.914:0030:01f0:trace:d3d12:dxgi_adapter_CreateDxgiAdapter DXGI_ADAPTER_DESC3 { Description="Intel(R) Arc(TM) A770 Graphics", VendorId=0x8086, DeviceId=0x56a0, SubSysId=0x199417aa, Revision=0x0, DedicatedVideoMemory=0, DedicatedSystemMemory=0, SharedSystemMemory=17179869184, AdapterLuid={LowPart=0, HighPart=0}, Flags=0x0, GraphicsPreemptionGranularity=0x0, ComputePreemptionGranularity=0x0, VRAMBudget=0, VRAMBudgetNonLocal=0 }

This indicates an E_INVALIDARG (0x80070057) error during D3D12 device creation on Intel Arc GPUs.

I have tried many GE-Proton versions (up to GE-Proton10-4). The game runs fine on Windows with the same hardware.
The freezes are common enough to seriously hinder gaming experience, since every time you reset to your last (auto) save.
Works fine on steam deck but can't launch on Ubuntu. Tried various proton versions/launch commands and tried waiting 5+ mins but same result every time. Did not try latest GE build.

gpu: AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT (radeonsi, gfx1201, LLVM 20.1.6, DRM 3.63, 6.15.6-arch1-1)
notes: Works great out of the box
Runs smoothly using a Radeon and the mesa driver
